title: The Childcare Payments (Eligibility) Regulations 2015, Regulation 15
body: Income not to exceed a certain level. A person is treated as meeting the condition of eligibility in section 10 if the person does not expect their adjusted net income to exceed £100,000 for the relevant tax year. A resident of a prescribed state who is in paid work in the United Kingdom is treated as meeting the condition of eligibility in section 10 if that person would not expect their hypothetical adjusted net income to exceed £100,000 for the relevant tax year.
